ksa_text: Knowledge of master data management (MDM) principles and architecture, including golden record construction, data domain definition, MDM hub models (registry, consolidation, coexistence, centralized), and stewardship workflows.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of test procedures, principles, and methodologies (e.g., Capabilities and Maturity Model Integration (CMMI)).

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Knowledge of test procedures, principles, and methodologies (e.g., Capabilities and Maturity Model Integration (CMMI)).
Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Data Quality is a primary or secondary domain for the Director of Data Engineering. This knowledge KSA is within scope for the role's expected competency profile and seniority level (director).

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Data Quality), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Framework signal is weak (composite 0.387). External validation of this knowledge KSA for the Director of Data Engineering role relies primarily on domain-level alignment rather than specific framework matches.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: DAMA-DMBOK Data Quality Management chapter and industry surveys confirm data quality competencies for quality-focused leadership roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: domain-level relevance of Data Quality for the Director of Data Engineering is corroborated by DAMA-DMBOK, CDO survey data, and role-specific job market analysis, despite weak cross-framework signal.

decision_rationale: Data Quality knowledge KSA is within scope for the Director of Data Engineering at the director tier. Seniority fit is appropriate. All three evaluation passes support inclusion.
